currentSliceTitle: Overworld Object Route Effect Authoring Validation
currentSliceNotes: P2.4 route-effect authoring validation in progress: inspect prior object AI/route evidence first; validate selected route/transit authoring expectations without broad pathing, renderer, save, resource, or AI migration.
nextActionGuardrailNote: Use PLAN.md active ids as the queue. Docs/reports are evidence, not implementation completion unless the slice is explicitly documentation/report-only. Worker-stopped state does not cancel the underlying product task. Phase 2 numbering is category order, not proof that earlier tracks are complete.

classificationRules.completed: Implementation or documentation-only governance work satisfies the PLAN completion criteria and has validation/evidence.
classificationRules.docs_ready: Source docs, plans, or reports exist, but the implementation slice is not complete.
classificationRules.paused: Deliberately stopped or deferred until a future explicit slice or owner decision selects it.
classificationRules.superseded: Replaced by a later accepted plan, slice, or implementation path; preserved as evidence only.
classificationRules.pending_after_implementation: Follow-up review that should wait for the named implementation output.

invalidArchivedSemantics.report_only: Encoded as status docs_ready with classification report_only when the helper status set requires valid statuses.
invalidArchivedSemantics.deferred: Encoded as status paused with deferredReason when the helper status set requires valid statuses.

reconciledHistorySummary.sourceOfTruth: project.md, PLAN.md, and ops/progress.json after progress architecture reconciliation on 2026-04-27.
reconciledHistorySummary.archiveRole: archive/document-reset-2026-04-27 is evidence/history only, not the active worker queue.
reconciledHistorySummary.implementationTruth: Many archived Phase 2 docs, reports, tooling, UI, terrain/editor, object metadata, economy proof, and strategic AI report harness slices were completed. They are grouped below as evidence and do not automatically complete broad Phase 2 parents.
reconciledHistorySummary.activeQueueRule: plannedSlices contains current executable parent and child slices only; archived worker spam stays in evidence/history arrays.

Focused report passed: GODOT_SILENCE_ROOT_WARNING=1 godot4 --headless --path . tests/ai_faction_personality_evidence_report.tscn; Thornwake wood and Brasshollow ore cases show positive affinity and lower priority under neutralized weights.

completionCriteria: The selected requirement is implemented or explicitly resolved according to its parent PLAN slice, with validation evidence recorded.

plannedSlices.title: Economy Wood Canonical Cleanup

sliceEvidence: Focused report, smoke test, validation output, or live proof demonstrates the selected child requirement.
completionCriteria: The selected requirement is implemented or explicitly resolved according to its parent PLAN slice, with validation evidence recorded.
plannedSlices.notes: Completed P2.3 second child: wood remains the live authored/runtime/save id and the canonical display concept. Default validation now asserts no target-only resource ids or alias pairs, positive wood occurrences, no production migration, no compatibility adapter adoption, no save rewrite, no SAVE_VERSION bump, and no rare-resource activation. The economy report exposes old-save compatibility proof, and strict fixtures keep wood as a valid stockpile id while rejecting unknown resources, negative amounts, stockpiled experience, missing registry metadata, and normal-market rare-resource buying. No production JSON migration, market overhaul, faction-cost rebalance, or save migration.

entries.title: Preserve existing AI faction-personality decision evidence

entries.title: Implement faction resource-affinity AI target scoring
entries.evidence: content/factions.json now authors resource_value_weights; EnemyAdventureRules.resource_pressure_report applies weighted resource values and resource_affinity_value to AI resource target priorities. Focused report validates Thornwake wood and Brasshollow ore affinity cases against neutralized weights.

entries.title: Validate faction mechanics identity hook
entries.evidence: Passed python3 tests/validate_repo.py; GODOT_SILENCE_ROOT_WARNING=1 godot4 --headless --path . tests/ai_faction_personality_evidence_report.tscn; python3 -m json.tool ops/progress.json >/tmp/heroes-progress-json.txt; git diff --check.

entries.title: Carry six-faction signature building chains into seed towns
entries.evidence: Highwater Keep, Nightglass Redoubt, and Prismhearth now expose their faction-specific seven-building signature chains while retaining legacy release-scenario buildings; all six seed towns now have signature buildings that unlock exactly their seven-unit faction ladders.

entries.title: Add direct seed-town recruit hooks for faction ladders
entries.evidence: Embercourt, Mireclaw, and Sunvault seed-town recruitment profiles now include direct growth and discount hooks for at least three six-faction ladder units; new-faction seed towns already carried at least two ladder hooks.

entries.title: Validate faction town, unit, hero, and roster asymmetry

Live AI task adoption and broad AI rewrite remain deferred behind report-only normalizer preservation and schema boundaries.
RMG implementation has no requirements document yet; generator children must wait for requirements.
